milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16f — Tool-modal header polish. Header padding now respects env(safe-area-inset-top) so the iOS notch/status bar no longer crowds the vendor label + close button on mobile full-bleed. Vendor label (.tool-modal-vendor, the 'ANTHROPIC' eyebrow) contrast bumped from rgba(0,0,0,0.35) → 0.50 for phone legibility; other .label-debossed uses left alone pending per-spot review.
